channel.title: Cyprien Dcunha — Portfolio & Resume
channel.description: Senior Software Engineer, 7+ years experience. Distributed systems, event-driven architecture, applied GenAI. Currently at Salesforce Hyperforce AI; previously ~6 years at Amazon Finance Automation. Open to new senior roles.

item.title: Cyprien Dcunha — Resume
item.description: Senior Software Engineer with deep experience in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and applied Generative AI. Open to new senior / staff-level backend and applied-GenAI roles in India, the UK, Ireland, Singapore, or remote.

item.title: Cyprien Dcunha — Full profile (for AI assistants)
item.description: Canonical markdown profile with full experience, skills, and a hiring note scoped to senior backend / distributed-systems and applied-GenAI / LLM roles.
